_comment: U24/B-U10 item 2 -- the maintenance-window schedule ENTRY (B-U10 CODE-MERGE gate acceptance (c), amended 2026-07-15: 'the maintenance-window schedule ENTRY exists (schedule file / plist / cron entry present, asserted by name) and its scheduled command is the reconcile sweep with --retry'). This file IS that entry -- the single source of truth both SKILL.md's doctrine text and scripts/install-github-archive-reconcile-cron.sh read from, so the two can never drift out of sync. Registering it live (openclaw cron create) is the LIVE-PROOF leg, deferred to U22.
name: skill6-github-archive-reconcile-sweep
description: Daily maintenance-window sweep of the Skill-6 GitHub archival rail. Confirms every VERCEL_EMBED page's source code actually landed in GitHub (D6/B-D2 non-blocking archival doctrine) and retries any missing/failed archive from its staged source. Never blocks or rolls back a live page -- this is a reconcile/retry pass only.
